2K26.note: u24 LE. 1440 ticks/day. Write: (old_stored % 1440) + days * 1440. Zero bytes 816-818 to clear.
bit 1 of byte 269. 1=player is a draft prospect (draft class player), 0=active/FA player.

options: Hype Crowd - I Can't Hear You
Hype Crowd - I Can't Hear You

2K26.note: bits 6-10 spanning bytes 926-927. Larry Bird exception years accrued (0-31).
bits 4-6 of byte 850. Original contract length in years. 0=0 Yrs, 1=1 Yr, 2=2 Yrs, 3=3 Yrs, 4=4 Yrs, 5=5 Yrs, 6=6 Yrs, 7=7 Yrs.
bits 4-5 of byte 848. Free agent status. 0=Unrestricted FA, 1=Restricted FA, 2=Rookie Restricted FA.
bits 5-6 of byte 842. Active option flag. 0=None, 1=Team Option Active, 2=Player Option Active.
bits 6-7 of byte 851. Contract option type. 0=None, 1=Team Option, 2=Player Option, 3=2-Year Team Option.
u31 LE at bytes 468-471 (bits 0-30). Annual salary in USD, current season.
u31 LE at bytes 472-475. Annual salary in USD, season +1.
u31 LE at bytes 476-479. Annual salary in USD, season +2.
u31 LE at bytes 480-483. Annual salary in USD, season +3.
u31 LE at bytes 484-487. Annual salary in USD, season +4.
u31 LE at bytes 488-491. Annual salary in USD, season +5.
